subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels the opposite carriageway across the median from the ego
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears across the median past the overpass rise, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the expressway, lifting over an overpass rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A flat N.American expressway on a clear summer night, a wide multi-lane divided highway of fresh dry asphalt with crisp reflective lane striping and reflective delineator posts. Sparse mast lighting glows at intervals; low sound walls and dark median flank the lanes. The expressway runs level then lifts over an overpass rise ahead, a crest that briefly hides then reveals the oncoming carriageway. Beyond the mast lights the corridor fades into open dark with distant tail-light strings.

lighting.conditions: Clear summer night on a lit expressway with sparse mast lighting; dry fresh roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare from across the median ahead and slightly left
lighting.shadows: Faint pooled shadows under mast lights, crisp on fresh asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Reflective striping and delineators sparkle under headlights; oncoming high beams across the median produce overwhelming bloom, sharp starburst flares, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Wide expressway to an overpass rise near mid-frame, oncoming glare across the median dominating upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep night blue and dark median over pale fresh asphalt with sparkling striping, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, fast, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious
aesthetics.patterns: Reflective lane striping and delineator posts streaking past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking at highway speed, subtle bob over the overpass rise, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and reflective striping ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a divided expressway

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the expressway at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint across the median past an overpass rise
Vehicle lifts over the overpass rise; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left across the median
Glare clears, expressway becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the expressway at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing across the median past an overpass rise
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear beyond the mast lights
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Lifting over the overpass rise as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left across the median, artifacts fade, expressway regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a flat expressway at night, ego headlights over sparkling reflective striping while faint oncoming glow appears past an overpass rise. By 0:01 the vehicle lifts over the rise and a pair of oncoming high beams across the median rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, sharp lens-flare starbursts, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the expressway reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady higher hum of the engine and rushing tire noise at expressway speed, dropping as the vehicle decelerates. Wind roar past the vehicle, a fast whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing across the median; no music or speech.
